name: Zhejiang NetSun Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang NetSun Co., Ltd. provides Internet information, e-commerce, and enterprise application software development services in China. It operates Websites, such as chemnet.com.cn, chinachemnet.com, texnet.com.cn, pharmnet.com.cn, toocle.cn, toocle.com, 100ppi.com, dazpin.com, sinopay.com, and sinoloans.cn. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.
